patches.description: Removes FirebaseInitProvider from AndroidManifest.xml as a research aid when VM-backed config data is missing.
patches.name: Disable FirebaseInitProvider

patches.description: Experimental JioTV 7.1.7 split-build patch. Suppresses LicenseClientV3 error handling only and does not disable VMRunner or StartupLauncher.
patches.name: Dismiss Google Play error dialog (371 split research)

patches.description: Sets usesCleartextTraffic to true in AndroidManifest and patches the network security config to allow cleartext HTTP traffic and user-installed CA certificates.
patches.name: Enable cleartext traffic

patches.description: Research patch for SSL/TLS inspection against tv.media.jio.com.
patches.name: Remove certificate pinning

patches.description: Research patch for emulator and unsupported-device checks in PermissionActivity.
patches.name: Remove emulator detection

patches.description: Research patch for root and integrity-related Java-side checks.
patches.name: Remove root detection
